chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. High Court Appeal No.442 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA 2874/2024. 2. For orders on CMA 2703/2024. 3. For orders on office objection a/w reply as at “A”. 4. For orders on CMA 2704/2024. 5. For hearing of main case. 6. For orders on CMA 2705/2024. 06.11.2024. Mr. Waseem Shaikh, advocate...... 1. Granted. 2 to 6. Learned counsel for the appellant when enquired about the maintainability of this Appeal, as it is against the ad-interim order, does not press it and stated that he would exhaust his remedy available to the appellant under the law before the learned Single Judge. Dismissed as not pressed alongwith all pending applications. Chief Justice Judge Ayub
